overview: VIBEology Medspa provides aesthetic treatments, hormone replacement therapy, and weight loss programs tailored to each patient's needs. Services are delivered by a board-certified nurse practitioner and medical director.
highlights: Advanced injectables and skin rejuvenation services
Hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for men and women
GLP-1 and peptide weight loss programs
targetAudience: Individuals seeking aesthetic enhancement, hormone optimization, weight loss support, and wellness treatments in the Prosper and surrounding Texas communities.
